primary_objective: Build a unified, AI-assisted recruiting operating system that gives Jake a measurable edge in coach engagement and program fit identification — replacing fragmented manual workflows with a structured, NCAA-compliant daily intelligence layer.
critical_constraints: Single-athlete scope with limited operator bandwidth for content production and system maintenance
Monthly tool and API budget capped at $500 USD
NCAA compliance guardrails required across all communication, contact timing, and outreach sequencing
Recruiting profile, target school list, and offer landscape shift in real time requiring system flexibility
High trust sensitivity with coaches and families demands consistent professional tone across all touchpoints
success_definition: Jake has a daily-use dashboard that surfaces actionable recruiting tasks without manual assembly
Coach outreach cadences are tracked, sequenced, and executed consistently across 20+ target programs
Film and highlight assets are integrated and shareable directly from coach relationship records
X/Twitter visibility campaigns run on a structured cadence tied to recruiting calendar milestones
Program fit scoring identifies and prioritizes best-match schools based on Jake's athletic and academic profile
All system operations remain demonstrably NCAA-compliant with documented process guardrails

value_pools.description: Reduces daily recruiting friction by consolidating outreach, film, and social activity into one structured workflow with AI-assisted prioritization
Provides visibility into recruiting pipeline health, coach engagement status, and compliance posture without requiring deep system involvement
Receives timely, professional, relevant outreach with direct film access — improving Jake's perceived seriousness and reducing coach-side friction
Validates an end-to-end recruiting intelligence architecture that could generalize beyond a single athlete

core_questions: What is the minimum viable daily operating rhythm that keeps Jake's recruiting pipeline active without overwhelming operator time?
How should program fit scoring be structured given real-time changes to Jake's profile, offers, and target list?
What is the right integration architecture between film (Hudl), coach CRM records, and X visibility campaigns?
Which NCAA contact and communication rules most directly constrain outreach sequencing and how should they be encoded into the system?
How do we keep total monthly infrastructure and API costs under $500 while maintaining core system functionality?
What are the leading indicators of recruiting pipeline health that should surface daily on the dashboard?
